_note: Feature with ACs that mention both desktop and mobile clients. Insight narrows scope to desktop only. Expected change map: scope changed yes, ACs changed yes, Edge Cases changed yes, Proposed Tasks potentially stale.

issue.title: Feature: Settlement date range filter
issue.body:
## Goal
Merchants can filter their settlement list by a custom date range to quickly find historical transactions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Merchants can select a start date and end date using a date picker on desktop browsers
- [ ] Merchants can select a date range using a native date input on mobile browsers
- [ ] The settlement list updates in real time as the date range changes
- [ ] Invalid ranges (start after end) show an inline error
- [ ] The selected range persists across page refreshes via URL query params

## Edge Cases
- Mobile browsers that do not support the `date` input type fall back to a text field with DD/MM/YYYY validation
- Date ranges spanning more than 12 months show a warning but are not blocked
- Selecting today as the end date includes all settlements up to the current moment

## Domain Events
- `SettlementListFiltered` — emitted when a Merchant applies or changes a date range

## Proposed Tasks
- [ ] Add date range picker component (desktop)
- [ ] Add mobile date input fallback
- [ ] Wire URL query param persistence
- [ ] Write integration tests

## Rollout
Feature-flagged behind `settlement-date-filter`. Enable for all Merchants once QA signs off.

## Bounded Context
Settlement domain. Merchant actor. No cross-domain side effects.
